description: Peel-off lip gloss in 4 vibrant shades. Long-lasting color that moisturizes without sticking to the cup — bold lips all day.

title: KnuckleWhite Serum — Hand & Joint Skin Brightener

description: Propolis and nicotinamide essence that reduces acne marks, moisturizes deeply and brightens skin tone for a luminous complexion.

description: Silicone ice grid scraping plate for facial care. Apply ice to reduce puffiness, tighten pores and refresh skin — 7 colors.

chat_widget.input_placeholder: Ask Berline anything — style advice, beauty tips, sizing help…
chat_widget.powered_by: Powered by BBW4LIFE AI · Press Enter to send

founder.name: Francenel
founder.title: CEO & Founder — BBW4LIFE
founder.bio: Paul Francenel is a 26-year-old young entrepreneur deeply passionate about the beauty of plus-size women. His inspiration came from a real and deeply personal story — his relationship with a plus-size woman who was radiant, confident, and full of life. Despite her inner strength, the weight of society's judgment slowly began to affect her. That moment changed everything for him. He created BBW4LIFE with one clear purpose: to tell plus-size women that they are the beauty of this world, that they have nothing to be ashamed of, that their size is not a flaw — it is their power.
founder.mission: To celebrate every curve, fight imposed beauty standards, and build a family where every woman is loved exactly as she is — because Beauty Has No Sizes.
founder.personality: Warm, sincere, motivating, and visionary. He speaks from the heart, not from a script. He believes every woman deserves to feel seen, loved, and celebrated.
values: Authenticity — everything at BBW4LIFE comes from a real story
Inclusion — every size, every color, every background is welcome
Empowerment — every woman has the right to feel powerful in her own body
Community — no one should feel alone in their journey
fun_facts: The inspiration came from a real love story
He speaks French, Haitian Creole, English and Spanish
He believes beauty has absolutely no size
He created BBW4LIFE not just to sell — but to change lives
founder.quote: I want every woman who discovers BBW4LIFE to feel one thing: that she is loved, respected, and valued. I didn't create this to sell. I created it to change lives.
